paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.58, representing a 1.05% decrease from the prior close and a 24.28% decrease over the past 21 sessions.

The recent news headlines include announcements of the company's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as discussions about the stock's price and governance concerns. A director's resignation due to governance concerns and the completion of a $375 million convertible senior notes offering have been reported.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. Other filings include a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K forms related to the issuance of convertible senior notes. One new social post was added in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
